boundary_metric: C_partial G_mu nu-(T_A+T_sigma)_mu nu/2 plus the metric multiplier equals zero
bulk: P1 bulk equations away from M4
claim_boundary: Boundary Axiom B1 and its intrinsic action are a provisional freeze, not a P1 derivation. Exact intrinsic M4 Lorentz structure is obtained, while one-normalization coefficient locking, the shifted junction background, scalar potential, full spectrum, physical gauge interpretation, absolute units, fermions, and Standard Model closure remain open.
connection: tau_A D_nu F^{nu mu}=J_match^mu; J_match=0 in the minimal freeze
conservation: Codazzi plus boundary diffeomorphism identity gives covariant conservation when all equations hold
energy_conservation: conditional on compatible bulk flux and matching data
junction: 2C5(K_mu nu-K h_mu nu)+2C_partial G_mu nu=T_A,mu nu+T_sigma,mu nu in the declared one-side orientation convention
scalar: Z_partial box_h sigma_partial-U_partial'=J_sigma,match; both sources vanish in the primary freeze
